text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One evening, we're walking through the shopping
district after a street performance, when...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, look, Trainer! Something's going on over
there!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Get a
ticket now and spin for your chance to win!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Aha... I see what's happening here.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: This is a test.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: A test of my Umadol stardom!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You know how I got a raffle ticket with that
dessert earlier? Just a single ticket...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: In other words...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
This is totally a test to see if I can get the grand
prize with just one chance!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: The Stardom Goddess!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
At any rate! When an Umadol is tested, we just
have to prevail!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to prove that I'm the best vessel for her
blessings!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon eagerly grabs the raffle machine's
lever...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Okay, star power! Time to shine! ☆ Yah! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And she spins it! A small plastic ball drops from
the tumbler's opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I... DID IT! ☆☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Did you see?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: That's what a real Umadol's capable of!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Thank you! ☆ See? My Umadol power is real!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, that just made my day. ♪ Anyway, should
we head home?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: Excuse me! Don't forget your prize!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ah.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: A hot spring vacation coupon...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I'm super happy, but... when should we go?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I only just made that declaration that I'll take first
place in every race...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It'll have to be after all my races are finished, I
guess.
choice_data_list: Then you can save it to use as a final reward.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I guess that's the best...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hold on a sec! Why are you talking like it's got
nothing to do with you? You're coming with me,
you know!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
If it's a reward for all our hard work, then you'll
need it just as much!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
We're working towards the same dream, aren't
we? We're in this together! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Besides, if we go once all this is over, I'll
definitely already be a top Umadol.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And a top Umadol needs a bodyguard even in her
off time, right?
choice_data_list: So that's why you want me there.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Ehe, I guess you got me. ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Geez, you're so dense...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Nothing! ☆ I'm really looking forward to our hot
spring getaway!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So in the end, I wind up holding on to our
vacation coupon for the time being.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yay! First prize. ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: It's not the grand prize... But still!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: First prize is the same as first place! And the deluxe hamburger steak has deluxe in the name!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: In other words... my Umadol power is deluxe!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: That makes sense, right?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Tonight's dinner is gonna be super special! I
hereby invite you to the Falco Dinner Show! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I enjoy a luxurious dinner that evening, while
listening to a delighted Smart Falcon sing.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Awww...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Aw!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Awww yeeeah! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Anyways...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Look at all these carrots! ☆ How can I
possibly eat them all? ♪
choice_data_list:
(She's just going to pretend that didn't
happen?!)

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I know! This should be enough to...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hi, everyooone! ☆ It's me, Falco!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Today's street performance has a special bonus!
Everyone who came to watch...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Gets one carrot! ☆ Hand delivered by yours
truly! ♪

text_block_list.name: Go-Getter Umamusume S
text_block_list.text: A carrot...

text_block_list.name: Silver-haired Umamusume O
text_block_list.text: A carrot...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I hope you'll stay until the very end! Let's make it
a good one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It could just be my imagination, but today's
audience seems a little larger than usual when all
is said and done.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the third
prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
There's something really important to me as an
Umadol.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And that is... being free to sing and dance
anywhere and anytime my fans desire!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: That's why winning this carrot—or should I say this carrot microphone...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Winning this carrot microphone means...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I've been acknowledged as a wonderful Umadol!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Stardom Goddess! I'm gonna do my
best to live up to your expectations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Twinkle... ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As if in response to Smart Falcon's words, the
stars peeking through the sunset appear to
twinkle.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I didn't lose!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Losing a raffle isn't a real loss! So I'm still full of
endless potential!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I am... right? I've gotta be...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Or what... Is this all my star power is worth? A
pack of tissues?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Juuuust kidding! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
A tissue is totally fine with me! If you have
enough tissues, you can build a mountain!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: That's why... Aha... haha...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's putting on a brave face, but Smart Falcon's
smile seems more than a little forced.
